query: SELECT id, email, name, role, isActive, mustChangePassword, loginMethod, CASE WHEN passwordHash IS NOT NULL THEN 'SET' ELSE 'NULL' END AS password_hash_status, createdAt FROM users WHERE role = 'admin' LIMIT 5;
